evals.title: LINE Official Account launch strategy
evals.prompt: We're a D2C skincare brand launching in Japan. We want to set up a LINE Official Account to build a customer base. We have zero LINE friends. Budget is ¥50,000/month for LINE. What should we do?
evals.expected_behavior: Should recommend Standard plan, suggest friend acquisition methods (QR code, website CTA, LINE Ads CPF campaign), design a welcome sequence with incentive, and propose a messaging calendar appropriate for the budget.

evals.title: Reduce block rate
evals.prompt: Our LINE Official Account has 15,000 friends but our block rate is 35%. We send 2 broadcasts per week. How do we fix this?
evals.expected_behavior: Should identify likely cause (too frequent or irrelevant broadcasts), recommend switching from broadcast to narrowcast with segmentation, suggest reducing frequency, and advise on content strategy that provides value.

evals.title: Rich menu design for restaurant
evals.prompt: We run a ramen restaurant chain with 5 locations in Tokyo. Design a rich menu for our LINE account.
evals.expected_behavior: Should propose a practical rich menu layout (e.g., 2×3 grid) with restaurant-relevant actions: today's menu, reservation, coupon, store locations, takeout order, and news/announcements.

evals.title: LINE Login integration for SaaS
evals.prompt: We have a B2C SaaS product targeting Japanese users. We want to add LINE Login to reduce signup friction and enable LINE messaging to users. How should we implement this?
evals.expected_behavior: Should explain LINE Login OAuth flow, recommend bot_prompt=aggressive for auto friend add, describe how to link LINE user ID with internal user records for personalized push messages.

evals.title: Narrowcast campaign for seasonal sale
evals.prompt: We're running a summer sale for our e-commerce store. We want to send a targeted LINE message to female users aged 20-34 in Tokyo and Osaka who clicked our previous campaign. How?
evals.expected_behavior: Should explain narrowcast API with demographic filters (gender=female, age=20-34, region=Tokyo+Osaka) combined with audience filter (click retargeting from previous campaign), and recommend Flex Message format for the sale announcement.
